Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG

VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS.

Column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG

VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.
